name: DNS Query To MEGA Hosting Website - DNS Client
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: DNS Query To MEGA Hosting Website - DNS Client
SIGMA Description: Detects DNS queries for subdomains related to MEGA sharing website

False positives:
- Legitimate DNS queries and usage of Mega

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=3008 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%userstorage.mega.co.nz%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY DNS Query To MEGA Hosting Website - DNS Client on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=3008 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%userstorage.mega.co.nz%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: DNS Query To MEGA Hosting Website - DNS Client
